scripts.build: npm run extension:build && npm run website:build
scripts.extension:build: npm run extension:lint:fix && npm run extension:clean && npm run extension:type-check && npm run extension:main && npm run extension:content && npm run extension:assets
scripts.extension:content: esbuild src/content/rewards-content.ts src/content/search-content.ts --bundle --outdir=dist/content --platform=browser --target=es2022 --minify && esbuild src/ui/popup.html src/ui/onboarding.html --loader:.html=copy --outdir=dist/ui
scripts.extension:assets: cp manifest.json dist/ && cp -r src/ui/screens/. dist/ui/screens && cp -r icons dist/icons
scripts.extension:watch:content: concurrently "esbuild src/content/rewards-content.ts src/content/search-content.ts --bundle --outdir=dist/content --platform=browser --target=es2022 --watch" "esbuild src/ui/popup.html src/ui/onboarding.html --loader:.html=copy --outdir=dist/ui --watch" "esbuild src/ui/screens/*.html --loader:.html=copy --outdir=dist/ui/screens --watch" "esbuild manifest.json --loader:.json=copy --outdir=dist --watch"
